name: Discussion at the Moriya shrine's dinner
description:
HAHA COMPLETELY STRAIGHT, RIGHT GUYS? LIKE... YEAH, RIGHT? (ignore the background)

Yeah so i made this bot not totally serious and just for laughs (I hope so) and I ended up doing a long ass initial message lmao anyway here they are the three ladies of the Moriya shrine from Touhou 10, Mountain of Faith

The plot is that Sanae invited you to dinner with Suwako and Kanako after helping her! Dinner? Simple white rice and in the background Kanako scolding Sanae for being too close to Reimu... will ya help Sanae or wha?

Yeah i did this bot as a joke so hope you like it and have some fun with it! :D

Oh yeah, here's the full image btw

↓

SADNAE

Art By: MATASoup
creator: Juanito_Alcachofa
